temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A person in a light-colored bathrobe holds another person, who is wearing a dark outfit and a red and green striped scarf, from behind. The person in the bathrobe lifts the other person, who is struggling, and carries them towards a small, frosted window in a white-tiled bathroom. The scene is dark and chaotic, with a brief, bright flash of light. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious situation, suggesting a struggle or abduction is taking place in a confined space.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a wide shot of a dark, snowy street at night. A single streetlight casts a hazy, blue-toned light over a steep, snow-covered hill. The street is empty and quiet, creating a desolate and eerie atmosphere. (Storyline: This establishing shot sets a cold, lonely, and mysterious tone for the story, contrasting the confined interior with the vast, empty exterior.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, suspenseful score continues from the previous scene.)
